name: Deep Research on 1988 DECtp: Digital Equipment's Transaction Processing Launch
description: Genspark AI deep research report on DEC's 1988 DECtp transaction processing launch. Covers 1988 SWOT analysis, DECtp product mix (VAX ACMS, DECintact, VAX Rdb, VAX DBMS), competitive benchmarking against IBM and Tandem, sales results 1988-1993, DECtp strengths/weaknesses analysis, and extensive analysis of Peter S. Kastner's role as DECtp launch committee chairman. Notes DEC's $11.5B 1988 revenue and subsequent financial difficulties. Flagged potential hallucinations noted in observations.
